red_lines: US military operations on Mexican soil

decision_history.event_description: US imposed 25% tariffs on Mexican goods and designated cartels as terrorist organizations
decision_history.decision_taken: Refused to accept cartel terrorist designation framing, negotiated migration enforcement commitments in exchange for tariff relief, maintained sovereignty rhetoric
decision_history.outcome: Partial tariff pauses tied to enforcement metrics, tense but functional relationship

decision_history.event_description: Fentanyl and cartel violence continued as bilateral flashpoint
decision_history.decision_taken: Increased visible enforcement operations, expanded intelligence sharing, maintained that demand is US problem
decision_history.outcome: Some cooperation improvements, relationship remained strained

cultural_context.domestic_power_base: MORENA party, urban poor, indigenous communities, public sector, progressive intellectuals

military_posture.force_disposition: internal security focused with limited external projection
